description: Style note Get comfortable in this soft cotton T-shirt from wildcraft and pair it with jeans and chappals for a great look.  Product Details Purple polo neck T-shirt, has short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, chest buttoned placket, brand embroidered on the left chest and a vented hem Material and Care 97% cotton and 3% lycra Machine wash in cold water using mild detergent Dry in shade Warm iron only Do not bleach  Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 32") is wearing a size MPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shown
